conflict_name: Atomic bombings of Hiroshima and Nagasaki
aliases: U.S. atomic bombings of Hiroshima and Nagasaki
family_summary: Two U.S. nuclear air attacks on Japanese cities in August 1945; this bundle splits the family into separate city-day direct-impact episodes for Hiroshima and Nagasaki.
notes: Bundle focuses on city-day direct-impact episodes and keeps later radiation/burn-complication mortality outside the core DR path unless explicitly separated by source.
